positive: A mystical, detailed portrait of a stylized howling wolf head, centered and filling the frame, rendered in a neo-tribal, illustrative style. The wolf should have strong, angular lines, glowing sapphire blue eyes, and be integrated with celestial elements such as crescent moons, stars, and nebula patterns flowing around its mane. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, silver, and bright sapphire blue accents. The overall mood should be dramatic, ethereal, and powerful. Clean, bold silhouettes suitable for printing on dark fabric. Minimalist background elements to keep focus on the central figure. Highly decorative linework, clean vector quality, high detail, graphic design style.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, low contrast, signature, signature, cropped, out of frame
